title: heliotropium zeylanicum var. subulatum
intro: Heliotropium zeylanicum var. subulatum, also known as the blue heliotrope, is a flowering plant species native to Sri Lanka. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Heliotropium zeylanicum var. subulatum include its use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or powders, and it can also be used topically as an ointment or paste.
